response.justification: Strong foundational engineer with 17 years of broad systems experience, but lacks the demonstrated AI/ML expertise and strategic advisory background required for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy. Recent pivoting into AI infrastructure work is insufficient for a role requiring recognized expertise in AI and ability to guide strategic customer adoption initiatives.
strengths: 17 years of proven software engineering across multiple domains, languages, and system scales
Demonstrated technical leadership through staff-level positions and founding GISCollective, a production platform used by Green Map
Deep experience with cloud infrastructure, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and backend systems handling high throughput
concerns: No academic background in AI/ML—BS in Computer Science is strong but lacks Master's or PhD in AI-related field (stated preference)
No demonstrated expertise building or leading AI products, platforms, or strategic initiatives at any organization
No evidence of strategic advisory role, director-level positioning, or recognized authority in AI strategy and adoption

key_factors.factor: Missing AI/ML domain expertise and recognized credentials
Lacks strategic and director-level experience in AI space
Strong foundational engineering and cross-domain learning capability
